snippet.title: IndyCar Engineers, Purdue Alums Talk Team Penske Legacy and Indy 500
snippet.description:
“This Is Purdue” had the chance to catch up with Matt Kuebel and Mike Koenigs, Team Penske IndyCar engineers and Purdue University alums, ahead of the 2023 Indy 500. 

You’ll hear Matt (BS mechanical engineering ’22) and Mike (MS aeronautical and astronautical engineering ’03) discuss their Purdue College of Engineering journeys and what it’s like working for one of the most well-known, legendary teams in motorsports. 

Check out all of our “This Is Purdue” podcast episodes: https://stories.purdue.edu/podcast/  

Subscribe to “This Is Purdue” on Apple Podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/this-is-purdue/id1496040232  

Check out all of our “This Is Purdue” video interviews on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@ThisIsPurdue

snippet.title: Joey Logano: Moving to TV after current 6-year contract?
snippet.description:
Two-time NASCAR Cup Series champ Joey Logano praises Team Penske owner Roger Penske, whom Logano has worked with since he joined the team in 2012. Logano praises “the Penske way” of professionalism and Roger’s commitment to prioritizing winning over profit. Plus, we get the inside scoop on the length of Joey’s 2022 contract renewal, predictions on when Joey will retire as a driver, and his interest in an eventual career pivot into broadcasting.

snippet.title: Além da Indy: a curta história da equipe Penske na F1
snippet.description:
Quando pensamos no nome de Roger Penske, a Formula 1 geralmente passa longe, e isso até faz sentido. O americano construiu um verdadeiro império disputando corridas na IndyCar, Nascar, Can-Am, Imsa e outras tantas categorias mundo afora. No começo da década de setenta Penske disputava a USAC, competição anterior a Cart e a Indycar. Em 1971 Penske aproveitou a passagem da F1 pelo continente norte americano e decidiu experimentar a categoria, inscrevendo o seu piloto para os GPs do Canadá e Estados Unidos, as ultimas provas do calendário. Correndo com um chassi McLaren M19A, Donohue fez o oitavo tempo no qualifying, o que por si só já era um resultado ótimo. Na corrida, o desempenho dos americanos foi surpreendentemente melhor, com o piloto chegando em terceiro.
A equipe americana permanecia aumentando a sua estrutura e os resultados melhoravam cada vez mais e em 73, Roger comprou a fabricante de carros McRae Cars, sediada no Reino Unido. A partir dali nasceu a equipe Penske na Formula 1. A passagem dos americanos na categoria foi breve, mas a sua marca ficou: a vitória de Watson no GP da Austria de 76 permanece sendo até hoje a última vitória de uma equipe americana na F1.

snippet.title: Team Penske IndyCar Design Engineer Matt Kuebel Discusses Purdue Journey
snippet.description:
“Purdue has given me some of my core memories. I’ve transitioned from a high school kid to working for one of the most well-known race teams in the history of motorsports. It’s given me opportunities and the confidence to know that I can tackle anything that comes my way.” 

Watch as Matt Kuebel (BS mechanical engineering ’22) discusses his Purdue College of Engineering journey and what it’s like working for Team Penske, one of the most well-known, legendary teams in motorsports.  

Matt, an IndyCar design engineer, works on all three Team Penske IndyCar entries: Josef Newgarden, Will Power and Scott McLaughlin.   

Listen to the full episode here: https://stories.purdue.edu/podcast/team-penske-indycar-engineers

snippet.title: Roger Penske thinks  the road to EVs in #NASCAR’s future starts with hybrid motors.
snippet.description:
Don’t think #nascar  is going straight to electric-only power soon. Roger Penske, the owner of back-to-back Cup series champion says that hybrid technology will be adopted by the stock series before a pure EV power unit will race at the top level.
Not so clear on this audio is Roger referring to an "ICE engine" (internal combustion engine) not a "nice" engine. 
His opinion mirrors passenger vehicle sales in the U.S. where the love affair with EVs have cooled off in favor of hybrid power which does require lengthy recharging coming along with range anxiety.
@Team_Penske @NASCAR @IndyCar

snippet.title: Ryan Blaney: "We Gave Roger Penske Two Firsts This Year"
snippet.description:
Reflecting on his championship season, Ryan Blaney takes pride in giving Roger Penske two accomplishments he's not had before. 

Blaney gave the Hall of Fame owner half of the Memorial Day weekend sweep with the Coca-Cola 600, and delivered his first back-to-back Cup titles.
